--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Fairy — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Fairy — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 26/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 15/67
--- Fairy — Winged Striker --- HP: 15/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (15/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Fairy — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
